title: Shoes Shop E-Commerce Website

requirements.text: Create a visually striking homepage with a hero section featuring a tagline, featured/new-arrival shoe products, and clear call-to-action buttons to browse collections.

quotes: create a website for shoes shop

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section is displayed at the top with a compelling headline and CTA button
A 'Featured Products' section shows at least 4 shoe product cards
Navigation bar includes logo/brand name, links to collections, cart icon

requirements.text: Build a product listing page that displays all available shoes in a grid layout, with filtering by category (e.g., Sneakers, Boots, Sandals, Formal) and sorting options (price, newest).

quotes: create a website for shoes shop

acceptanceCriteria: Products are displayed in a responsive grid (2–4 columns depending on screen size)
Category filter buttons narrow down the displayed products
Sort dropdown allows sorting by price (low-high, high-low) and newest
Each product card shows image, name, price, and an 'Add to Cart' button

requirements.text: Create a product detail page accessible by clicking a product card, showing multiple product images, full description, available sizes, price, and an 'Add to Cart' button.

quotes: create a website for shoes shop

acceptanceCriteria: Product detail page is reachable from the product listing page
Page displays product name, price, description, and available sizes
User can select a size before adding to cart
Add to Cart action updates the cart item count in the navigation bar

requirements.text: Implement a shopping cart sidebar or page that lists added items with quantity controls, subtotal, and a checkout summary. Persist cart state in the frontend session.

quotes: create a website for shoes shop

acceptanceCriteria: Cart displays each item with image, name, size, quantity controls, and line total
User can remove items or change quantity
Order subtotal is calculated and displayed
Cart persists during the session (React state or local storage)

requirements.text: Seed the backend with a realistic catalog of at least 12 sample shoe products across multiple categories, each with a name, description, price, category, available sizes, and an image filename.

quotes: create a website for shoes shop

acceptanceCriteria: Backend actor stores a list of products with id, name, description, price, category, sizes, and imageFilename fields
At least 12 products across at least 3 categories are pre-seeded
Query functions allow fetching all products, by category, and by id

requirements.text: Apply a bold, modern streetwear-inspired visual theme: dark charcoal backgrounds, warm off-white text, vibrant amber/orange accent color for CTAs and highlights, clean sans-serif typography, and generous whitespace. Maintain this theme consistently across all pages and components.
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses dark charcoal (#1a1a1a or similar), off-white (#f5f0eb or similar), and amber/orange accents (#e8891a or similar)
Typography uses a clean modern sans-serif font consistently throughout
Theme is applied uniformly on homepage, listing page, product detail, and cart

constraints: All Motoko backend logic must remain in a single actor file (backend/main.mo)
Do not edit any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
No external payment integrations or real checkout processing
nonGoals: Real payment processing or order management system
Order history or purchase confirmation emails

required: Bold street-style shoe shop logo mark — angular sole silhouette with brand wordmark 'Sole Street' in a modern sans-serif (sole-street-logo.dim_320x80.png)
Full-width hero banner showing stylish sneakers on a dark background with dramatic side lighting (hero-banner.dim_1440x600.png)
Product photo: white minimalist sneaker on clean background (shoe-sneaker-white.dim_600x600.png)
Product photo: black leather ankle boot on clean background (shoe-boot-black.dim_600x600.png)
Product photo: tan suede casual loafer on clean background (shoe-loafer-tan.dim_600x600.png)
Product photo: neon-accented running sneaker on clean background (shoe-runner-neon.dim_600x600.png)
Product photo: brown classic oxford dress shoe on clean background (shoe-oxford-brown.dim_600x600.png)
Product photo: strappy sandal in nude/beige tones on clean background (shoe-sandal-nude.dim_600x600.png)
